content: Design and implement task scheduling schema (simple + cron) in MongoDB
Build scheduler worker service with queue management
Add scheduling API endpoints (PUT /api/tasks/{id}/schedule, POST /api/tasks/{id}/run-now, etc.)
Implement execution queue + multi-task parallel worker pool with intelligent scaling
Add queue management API endpoints (GET /api/queue/status, POST /api/queue/rebalance)
Build creative exploration engine (internal context-based idea generation)
Implement Analytics backend aggregation endpoints (overview, autonomy, tasks, tools, memory, providers)
Build dedicated Analytics page with charts and auto-refresh
Add analytics overview widgets to main Dashboard
Build Task Scheduling UI (schedule editor, interval/cron tabs, next-run preview)
Test Phase 5 features comprehensively via testing_agent_v3
Fix any bugs found during testing
Mark Phase 5 as COMPLETED in plan.md
